questionHtml: Deduce whether the overall field around the wire is electric, magnetic or a combination of both according to observer Y.
markschemeHtml:
positive charges are moving, so there is a magnetic field

the density of positive charges is higher than that of negative charges, so there is an electric field

 

The reason must be given for each point to be awarded.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Deduce whether the overall field around the wire is electric, magnetic or a combination of both according to observer Y.
